items.title: OKX and HashKey invest in new Vietnam exchange ahead of crypto licensing push
items.summary: The partnership will help the exchange meet Vietnam's $380 million capital requirement to enter a government pilot program aimed at licensing local platforms and curbing offshore trading.

items.title: OKX Ventures, HashKey back VPBank-linked CAEX for Vietnam crypto pilot push
